title: Welcome Week Orientation
description: Meet your lecturers, tour the campus, and get your student ID. Morning tea provided.

title: Introduction to Data Science
description: First lecture of INF301 — bring your laptop and AIIHE login credentials.

title: Inclusive Design Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop on building accessible digital products. All students welcome.

title: International Student Mixer
description: Social event for international students — free pizza, games, and networking.

title: Campus Basketball Pickup Game
description: Casual basketball game at the Sports Centre. All skill levels welcome!

title: Health Sciences Guest Lecture
description: Dr. Sarah Mitchell on 'The Future of Telehealth in Rural Australia'

title: Art Exhibition: Emerging Voices
description: Student art exhibition showcasing works from the 2026 cohort. Gallery on ground floor.

title: Library Research Skills Session
description: Learn advanced database searching, referencing tools, and AI-assisted research.
